title: Marketplace Manager - Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Amritsar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates:
Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fabindia Online Asia Pacific Associates!
